name: orchestrator_multiagent
description: SDLC orchestrator with automatic multi-agent delegation for Jira story implementation
welcomeMessage:
👋 Ready to implement Jira stories!

Just say: "Help me implement <JIRA_URL>"

I'll automatically:
  1. Fetch & validate story
  2. Explore codebase
  3. Review architecture
  4. Create implementation plan
  5. Coordinate implementation
  6. Run quality checks
  7. Create PR

Supported projects: Config Studio (DPAY-), GCP (GCP-), CAP (TIMON-), Smart Payment Routing (SPR-), TRP|PAP (DPAY-)
